title: thymus serpyllum f. rochelianus
intro: Thymus serpyllum f. rochelianus, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which help to combat infections and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum f. rochelianus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of creeping thyme include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or inhaled to harness its medicinal properties.
